title: See all tasks in one place
excerpt: I know this has been covered before, and I know there was a BETA feature which has now been removed from labs. But what is the latest on this? It’s the most basic of basic features and staggering it still isn’t a thing. …

posts.author: DarrenBolton (Darren Bolton)
posts.cookedHtml:
I know this has been covered before, and I know there was a BETA feature which has now been removed from labs. But what is the latest on this? It’s the most basic of basic features and staggering it still isn’t a thing. I find MY WEEK borderline useless and so big and bulky and clumsy I simply won’t use it. There’s the search option, but my team won’t do it, or forget. This should be a feature, all my tasks, or/and a widget if not a main menu item. But a way to see all tasks!! Even the search click a person view would be fine, just have a MY TASKS which goes here.

I really hope this gets added soon, but I know it’s been discussed for over 2 years and still nothing…
